title: dioscorea hirtiflora subsp. hirtiflora
intro: Dioscorea hirtiflora subsp. hirtiflora is a species of yam, a type of flowering plant in the family Dioscoreaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is used to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. The health benefits of Dioscorea hirtiflora subsp. hirtiflora include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Dioscorea hirtiflora subsp. hirtiflora include dried roots, which are often used to make teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
